title: euphrasia odontites proles serotinus
intro: Euphrasia odontites proles serotinus, also known as late summer-spurred gentian, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia odontites plant, which belongs to the gentian family. It is a perennial herb that grows in wet meadows and is native to parts of Europe. The medicinal properties of Euphrasia odontites proles serotinus include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating eye problems and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat conditions like conjunctivitis, hay fever, and bronchitis.
